column1: - Color Features: RGB histogram with 32 bins per channel
- Texture Features: Sobel gradient magnitude (mean and std)
- Selection: One representative image per cluster (closest to centroid)
- color_variation: Standard deviation of color histogram (higher = more diverse colors)
- avg_brightness: Mean of color histogram (higher = brighter image)
- texture_intensity: Mean gradient magnitude (higher = more edges/details)
- texture_variation: Standard deviation of gradients (higher = more texture variety)

column2: file_path
column3: filename
